name: Shadow Vampire
name_jp: シャドウ・ヴァンパイア
desc: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 DARK "Vampire" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Shadow Vampire", but monsters you control cannot attack for the rest of this turn, except that Special Summoned monster.
mnst_eff: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 DARK "Vampire" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Shadow Vampire", but monsters you control cannot attack for the rest of this turn, except that Special Summoned monster.
eff: Cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 DARK "Vampire" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Shadow Vampire", but monsters you control cannot attack for the rest of this turn, except that Special Summoned monster.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

summoning: Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
